title: Network alert received
message: INC-2026-00424 reports VPN tunnel packet loss on VPN-HUB-SEA-01.

payload.current_state: Primary VPN tunnel packet loss is 18%; latency is 220 ms.
payload.requested_outcome: Fail over to a healthy tunnel and validate connectivity.

title: SOP retrieved
message: Validate tunnel health, fail over safely, require approval, and confirm packet loss recovery.

payload.title: VPN Tunnel Loss Failover
controls: Confirm peer tunnel health before failover.
Do not reset both tunnels simultaneously.
Validate packet loss and latency after failover.

title: Historical tickets compared
message: 5 similar tickets found; 1 unsafe precedent flagged.

items.summary: Failed branch traffic to secondary tunnel.
Engineer reset both VPN peers at the same time.
items.notes: Unsafe precedent: branch connectivity was fully interrupted.

items.summary: Failover did not recover because carrier loss affected both paths.

title: SOP beats history
message: Unsafe history reset both tunnels; SOP requires confirming and using the healthy secondary path.

blocked_precedent.summary: Engineer reset both VPN peers at the same time.
blocked_precedent.notes: Unsafe precedent: branch connectivity was fully interrupted.

title: Evidence summary structured
message: Proceed with SOP-governed mock remediation for VPN tunnel packet loss.

payload.outcome: Proceed with SOP-governed mock remediation for VPN tunnel packet loss.
sop_controls: Confirm peer tunnel health before failover.
Do not reset both tunnels simultaneously.
Validate packet loss and latency after failover.
payload.governance_note: SOP beats history: HIST-VPN-2026-009 is visible as a warning, not copied into the remediation plan.

title: Safe remediation plan generated
message: Fail over traffic from primary VPN tunnel to secondary tunnel in mock mode.

payload.summary: Fail over traffic from primary VPN tunnel to secondary tunnel in mock mode.
payload.action_preview: Mock action: shift branch route preference to secondary tunnel and monitor loss for 5 minutes.
payload.estimated_effect: Packet loss reduces from 18% to 0.4%; latency returns below 70 ms.
safeguards: Human approval is required before remediation.
SOP controls override unsafe historical precedent.
payload.escalation_condition: Escalate to carrier if both tunnels exceed 3% packet loss.

title: Policy gate passed with approval hold
message: Policy allows planning but requires human approval before mock execution.

checks.name: Target scope
checks.message: Targets are limited to approved scenario resources.

checks.name: Dry-run guard
checks.message: Plan uses a dry-run or mock-only action preview.

checks.name: Human approval
checks.message: Human approval is required before remediation.

checks.name: Mock-only execution
checks.message: Plan is constrained to mock execution.

title: Approval package structured
message: Approve mock-only remediation for VPN tunnel packet loss.

payload.operator_message: Approve mock-only remediation for VPN tunnel packet loss.
payload.expected_safe_effect: Packet loss reduces from 18% to 0.4%; latency returns below 70 ms.

title: Human approval required
message: Operator review is required before mock remediation can continue.

payload.side_effects: Replay mode disables approval side effects.

title: Mock remediation executed
message: Mock failover moved traffic to the secondary VPN tunnel and restored loss metrics.

title: Scenario validation passed
message: Packet loss recovered from 18% to 0.4% and latency recovered to 62 ms.

payload.name: Scenario validation
payload.message: Packet loss recovered from 18% to 0.4% and latency recovered to 62 ms.

title: RCA and audit evidence generated
message: Primary VPN underlay path showed sustained packet loss.

payload.root_cause: Primary VPN underlay path showed sustained packet loss.
payload.validation: Packet loss recovered from 18% to 0.4% and latency recovered to 62 ms.
payload.business_impact: Branch Connectivity remained protected during the synthetic workflow.
follow_up: Open carrier ticket for primary path.

title: Closure decision required
message: Remediation is validated. Operator can close the incident now or keep it under observation before closure.

options.label: Approve closure
options.message: Close the incident with RCA and audit evidence attached.

options.label: Observe first
options.message: Keep the incident under observation, recheck metrics, then close.

title: Incident closed
message: INC-2026-00424 was closed with RCA, evidence, and validation attached.
